channel.title: Karpaty
channel.description: A collection of thoughts, essays and service notes

item.title: Rust, Docker, and the GHA layer caching problem
item.description: Lately I've been working on my own vibe-designed todo app rewrite in Rust[^1]. Along the way I started looking for a sensible path to optimizing Docker image builds on GitHub Actions. One of the solutions you can easily stumble upon is cargo-chef — it separates dependency fetching from building...
item.author: jpalczewski@gmail.com (Jacek Palczewski)

item.title: How to improve Zotero experience?
item.description: It's an old note, just for archival purposes. There might be newer alternatives. Also, old blog template used another method of referencing urls, don't have it yet here, so leaving it as-is: link I have a need to share how much I love Zotero. It was a tool that was a significant part of my...
item.author: jpalczewski@gmail.com (Jacek Palczewski)

item.title: Implication of deploying github page to another repo
item.description: Be aware that it is a n old post. Just reference or an inspiration if someone is lost. Years ago I had a thought to seperate repo with hugo theme and the one with rendered page due to possible use of utterances[^1]. There are my experiences with both approaches: deploying page to the same repo -...
item.author: jpalczewski@gmail.com (Jacek Palczewski)
